app.title: E.C.V.A.M.M.
app.subtitle: Extremely Cool Very Awesome Mod Maker
app.description: Create or open a Mindustry mod to get started.
new_mod.title: New Mod
new_mod.author: Author:
dialog.delete_confirm:
Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
The HJSON and sprite files will also be removed.
dialog.build_not_ready: Build is not ready yet. You can zip the file and use it like a mod.
select.folder_create: Select folder to create mod in
error.invalid_mod:
This folder is not a valid Ecvamm mod.
Only mods created with Ecvamm can be opened.
dialog.recovery_ask:
A mod.hjson was found but no .mindtool.json project file.
Do you want to scan the content folders and recover the project?
dialog.recovery_waypoint_ask:
The project file is missing or corrupted.
Waypoints (saved snapshots) were found. Do you want to restore one?
credits.title: Credits
credits.text:
Made by Kaviundurs
The Ecvamm
I did here for other updates.
grid.no_content:
No content yet.
Use '+ Add Content' to get started.

block_editor.title: Block Editor
settings.title: Settings
settings.restart_notice: Some settings will take effect after restarting the application.
mod_settings.title: Mod Settings
waypoint.title: Waypoints
waypoint.restore_confirm:
Restore project state from snapshot {ts}?
Current unsaved changes will be lost.
waypoint.clean_noop: 10 or fewer waypoints exist. Nothing to clean.
waypoint.clean_confirm:
Delete {count} old waypoints?
The last 10 will be kept.
tooltip.item.name: The internal ID of the item. Used in code and HJSON references. No spaces allowed.
tooltip.item.displayName: The name shown to players in-game.
tooltip.item.description: Short description shown in the item info panel. Supports color tags like [#ff0000]red.
tooltip.item.details: Extended description shown when the player clicks for more info.
tooltip.item.color: The color of the item displayed in-game, in hex format.
tooltip.item.hardness:
How hard this item is to mine. Higher values require better drills. 
Thorium - 4, Coal - 2
tooltip.item.cost:
Base material cost. Affects how long buildings that use this item take to construct. 
copper - 0.5, thorium - 1.1
tooltip.item.explosiveness:
How explosive this item is. High values cause explosions when the item burns.
thorium - 0.2, blast compound - 1.2
tooltip.item.flammability:
How flammable this item is. Values above 0.3 make it eligible for item burners.
blast compound - 0.4, coal - 1
tooltip.item.radioactivity:
How radioactive this item is. Affects nearby units and buildings.
thorium - 1, phase fabric - 0.6
tooltip.item.charge:
How electrically potent this item is.
surge alloy - 0.75
tooltip.item.healthScaling: Multiplies the default health of buildings that require this item.
tooltip.item.frames:
If greater than 0, this item is animated with this many frames.
!!this not working!!
tooltip.item.transitionFrames:
Number of generated transition frames between each animation frame.
!!this not working!!
tooltip.item.frameTime:
Ticks between each animation frame.
!!this not working!!
tooltip.item.lowPriority:
If enabled, drills will only mine this item when nothing else is available.
sand
tooltip.item.buildable: If disabled, this item cannot be used in building construction and will be incinerated in cores.
tooltip.item.hidden: If enabled, this item is hidden from the player.
tooltip.item.research: The ID of the item or block that must be researched before this item unlocks.
tooltip.block.name: The internal ID of the block. Used in code and HJSON references. No spaces allowed.
tooltip.block.displayName: The name shown to players in-game.
tooltip.block.health:
The maximum health of the block.
duo - 250, carbide wall - 1080
tooltip.block.size:
Block size in cells (e.g. 2 → 2x2).
duo - 1, kiln - 2
tooltip.block.armor:
Damage reduction percentage.
 carbide wall - 16, beryllium wall - 2
tooltip.block.requirements: Resources needed to build or place this block. Format: item/amount.
tooltip.block.solid: Is this a solid, impassable block?
tooltip.block.update: Does this block update every tick?
tooltip.block.craftTime: Duration of one crafting cycle in ticks.
tooltip.block.description: Short description shown in the block info panel. Supports color tags like [#ff0000]red.
tooltip.block.color: The color of the block displayed on the map, in hex format (e.g. aabbcc).
tooltip.block.category: Build category in the schematic menu (e.g. defense, crafting, distribution).
tooltip.block.lightningChance: Chance of lightning striking when damaged. -1 = disabled.
tooltip.block.lightningDamage: Damage dealt by each lightning bolt.
tooltip.block.lightningLength: Length of the lightning arc in cells.
tooltip.block.chanceDeflect: Chance to deflect incoming projectiles. -1 = disabled.
tooltip.block.flashHit: Does the block flash when hit?
